restock.title: Smart Restock
restock.subtitle: Based on your consumption patterns and current inventory.
restock.noData: Not enough data yet. Consume some bottles so we can analyze your drinking patterns.

help.title: Help & Features
help.subtitle: Everything you need to know about using Cellarion.
help.noResults: No matching topics found. Try a different search term.

cellars.title: Cellars
cellars.summary: Create cellars to organize your wine collection.
cellars.d1: Create cellars by clicking "+ New Cellar" and typing a name.
cellars.d2: Each cellar is a separate bottle collection.
cellars.d3: Open a cellar to see all its bottles. Filter by search, vintage, rating. Sort by newest/oldest/price/rating.
cellars.d4: Cellar overview tab shows: bottle count, total value, and links to Racks and Room View.

bottles.title: Bottles
bottles.summary: Add, manage, and track individual bottles in your cellars.
bottles.d1: Add a bottle: click "+ Add Bottle" in a cellar. Two ways: search the wine database by name, OR scan a wine label with your phone camera (AI identifies the wine).
bottles.d2: Bottle detail page shows: wine info, vintage, price paid, market value estimate, your rating, your notes, images, grape varieties, aging & maturity status, price evolution chart.
bottles.d3: Edit details: click "Edit Details" on the bottle page to change vintage, price, rating, notes, size.
bottles.d4: Upload photos: on the bottle detail page, you can add photos of the bottle or label. Background removal is automatic.
bottles.d5: Share a bottle: click the share icon on the bottle detail page to send a link to someone.
bottles.d6: Consume/remove: click "Remove Bottle" to mark it as consumed. Set the date you drank it. The bottle moves to the cellar's history.
bottles.d7: Write a review: on the bottle detail page, scroll down to write a community review.

labelScan.title: Label Scanning
labelScan.summary: Scan a wine label with your camera to identify it automatically.
labelScan.d1: Available when adding a bottle — click the camera button.
labelScan.d2: Take a photo of the wine label and the AI will read it and identify the wine.
labelScan.d3: Works with most printed labels. Best results with clear, well-lit photos.
labelScan.d4: After scanning, the wine details are pre-filled. Review and save.

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.summary: Share cellars with friends or send a link to a specific bottle.
sharing.d1: Share a cellar: open a cellar → click the "..." menu → Share. Invite someone by email as Viewer (can browse) or Editor (can add/remove bottles). Only the cellar owner can share.
sharing.d2: Share a bottle: on any bottle detail page, click the share icon to send a direct link to someone.

racks.title: Racks
racks.summary: Organize bottles in physical rack grids that match your real storage.
racks.d1: Access racks: open a cellar → click the "..." menu → Racks.
racks.d2: Create racks with custom names and sizes (any number of rows × columns).
racks.d3: Place bottles into rack slots by clicking an empty slot and selecting a bottle.
racks.d4: Visual grid shows which slots are filled and which are empty.

roomView.title: 3D Room View
roomView.summary: Build a 3D virtual room that mirrors your real cellar.
roomView.d1: Access: open a cellar → overview tab → Room View.
roomView.d2: Place and arrange your racks in a virtual 3D room.
roomView.d3: Click "Edit" to enter edit mode: drag racks, rotate them, add unplaced racks.
roomView.d4: Click "Save" to keep your layout. Come back anytime to rearrange.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.summary: Track wines you want to buy.
wishlist.d1: Click "+ Add Wine" to search the database and add a wine to your wishlist.
wishlist.d2: Add notes (e.g. where to buy it) and set a target price.

restock.title: Smart Restock
restock.summary: Automatic analysis of your consumption patterns vs inventory.
restock.d1: Shows: bottles consumed per year, purchased per year, net change, and years of runway.
restock.d2: Breaks down stock levels by wine type, grape, region, country, and producer.
restock.d3: Flags categories running low based on your actual drinking pace.
restock.d4: Fully automatic — based on your consumption history. No manual setup needed.

journal.title: Wine Journal
journal.summary: Write tasting notes and record your wine experiences.
journal.d1: Click "+ New Entry" to create a tasting note.
journal.d2: Each entry records the wine, your impressions, and the occasion.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.summary: Wine recommendations from friends and other users.
recommendations.d1: Other users can recommend wines to you.
recommendations.d2: View their suggestions and add wines you like to your cellar or wishlist.

cellarChat.title: Cellar Chat
cellarChat.summary: Chat with an AI sommelier who knows your entire cellar.
cellarChat.d1: Ask for food pairings, what to drink tonight, or wine suggestions from your collection.
cellarChat.d2: The sommelier knows all your bottles, ratings, and notes.
cellarChat.d3: Usage limits depend on your plan (Free: 4/week, Basic: 20/day, Premium: 50/day).

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.summary: Charts and insights about your wine collection.
analytics.d1: Collection value over time, bottles by country/type/grape/region.
analytics.d2: World map showing where your wines come from.
analytics.d3: Drink window overview: wines that are ready, still aging, or past peak.
analytics.d4: Export your stats as a shareable card image.
analytics.d5: Premium feature — available on the Premium plan.

community.title: Community
community.summary: Connect with other wine lovers through reviews and discussions.
community.d1: Reviews tab: browse wine reviews from other users.
community.d2: Discussions tab: forum-style threads. Create new discussions, reply to others.
community.d3: Follow other users and view their profiles.

wineRequests.title: Wine Requests
wineRequests.summary: Suggest wines missing from the database.
wineRequests.d1: Click "+ New Request" to suggest a wine.
wineRequests.d2: An admin reviews and adds approved wines so everyone can use them.

import.title: Bulk Import
import.summary: Import your wine collection from a CSV or JSON file.
import.d1: Access: open a cellar → "..." menu → Import Bottles.
import.d2: Upload a CSV or JSON file with your wine data.
import.d3: AI helps match imported wines to the database automatically.

settings.title: Settings
settings.d1: Currency preference (used for prices and value calculations).
settings.d4: Push notification preferences and device management.

history.title: Cellar History
history.summary: View all bottles you've consumed from a cellar.
history.d1: Access: open a cellar → "..." menu → History.
history.d2: Shows every bottle you've marked as consumed, with dates.

other.title: Other Features
other.summary: Blog, plans, support, and NFC tags.
other.d2: Plans (/plans): subscription tiers — Free, Basic, Premium.
other.d3: Support (/support): submit support tickets for help.
other.d4: NFC tags: attach NFC tags to racks — scan with your phone to open the rack directly.

tour.createCellar: Click the "+ New Cellar" button. Give it a name like "Kitchen Rack" or "Wine Fridge" — each cellar is a separate collection.
tour.addBottleSelect: First, click on the cellar where you want to add a bottle.
tour.addBottleClick: Now click "Add Bottle" — you can search our database of thousands of wines or scan a label with your camera!
tour.scanSelect: First, select the cellar where you want to add the scanned wine.
tour.scanAddBottle: Click "Add Bottle" to open the add bottle page.
tour.scanClick: Now click the camera button to take a photo of your wine label. The AI will read the label and identify the wine automatically!
tour.wishlistAdd: Click "Add Wine" to search for a wine you want to buy. You can add notes about where to find it and set a target price!
tour.shareCellarSelect: Click on the cellar you want to share with someone.
tour.shareMenu: Click the menu button (three dots) to see more options.
tour.shareClick: Click "Share" to invite someone by email. You can give them view-only or editor access!
tour.racksSelect: Click on the cellar you want to organize.
tour.racksMenu: Click the menu button (three dots) to find the Racks option.
tour.racksClick: Click "Racks" to see your physical rack layout. You can create racks in different sizes to match your real wine storage!
tour.journalAdd: Click "New Entry" to write a tasting note. Record the wine, your impressions, aromas, flavors, and how it made you feel!
tour.cellarChatInput: Try asking "What should I drink tonight with pasta?" or "Which of my wines is at peak maturity?" — the sommelier will recommend wines from your cellar!
tour.statistics: Here you can see detailed charts and insights about your wine collection — value trends, country distribution, drink windows, and more.
tour.settings: Here you can customize your experience — currency, language, rating scale, notification preferences, and your profile.
tour.restock: Here you can see wines that are running low in your cellar. You can set alerts to be notified when it's time to restock!
tour.recommendations: Here you can get wine recommendations from friends and other users.
tour.roomSelect: First, select the cellar you want to build a 3D room for.
tour.roomOpen: Click "Room View" to enter the 3D room builder. Here you can place your racks in a virtual room that mirrors your real cellar!
tour.roomEdit: Click "Edit" to start arranging your room. In edit mode you can drag racks, rotate them, and position everything.
tour.roomAddRack: Click "Add Rack" to place your racks into the 3D room. Drag them around to match your real layout.
tour.roomSave: When you're happy with the arrangement, click "Save" to keep your room layout!
tour.importSelect: Select the cellar where you want to import bottles.
tour.importMenu: Click the menu button (three dots) to find the Import option.
tour.importClick: Click "Import Bottles" to open the bulk import tool. You can upload a CSV or JSON file!
tour.consumeSelect: First, open the cellar that has the bottle you drank, then click on the bottle.
tour.consumeClick: Click this button to mark the bottle as consumed. You can set the date you drank it and add tasting notes. It moves to your cellar history!
tour.reviewSelect: Open a cellar, then click on the bottle you want to review.
tour.reviewClick: Click "Write a Review" to share your thoughts with the community. Your review appears on the wine's page and in the community feed!
tour.suggestWine: Click here to suggest a wine that's missing from our database. An admin will review it and add it so everyone can use it!
tour.discussionCreate: Click "New Discussion" to start a conversation with other wine lovers. Share discoveries, ask questions, or discuss pairings!
tour.historySelect: Select the cellar whose history you want to see.
tour.historyMenu: Click the menu button (three dots) to find the History option.
tour.historyClick: Click "History" to see all bottles you've consumed from this cellar, with dates and tasting notes.
tour.done: There you go! Is there anything else you'd like help with?
tour.stopped: No problem! Let me know if you need anything else.

faq.createCellar: I can show you how to create your first cellar!
faq.addBottle: Adding a bottle is easy! I can walk you through it step by step.
faq.scanLabel: You can scan a wine label with your camera to automatically identify it!
faq.wishlist: The Wishlist helps you track wines you want to buy.
faq.share: You can share a cellar with friends or family!
faq.racks: Racks help you map your physical wine storage. You can create racks in any size!
faq.journal: The Journal is perfect for recording your tasting experiences.
faq.chat: Cellar Chat is an AI sommelier that knows your entire collection!
faq.statistics: The Analytics page shows beautiful charts about your collection.
faq.settings: You can customize your experience in Settings.
faq.restock: Restock tracking shows you when your favorites are running low.
faq.recommendations: Get wine recommendations from friends and other users!
faq.import: You can import bottles in bulk from a CSV or JSON file!
faq.room: You can build a 3D virtual room that mirrors your real cellar!
faq.consume: You can mark a bottle as consumed and keep a record of when you drank it.
faq.review: You can write reviews that other users see in the community feed!
faq.suggestWine: If a wine is missing from our database, you can suggest it!
faq.discussion: Start a discussion with other wine lovers in the community!
faq.history: Your cellar history shows every bottle you've consumed.
faq.nfc: You can attach NFC tags to your racks! When scanned with a phone, they open the rack view directly.
faq.general: Cellarion helps you manage your wine collection! You can create cellars, add bottles, organize with racks, build a 3D room, track your wishlist, write tasting notes, and much more.

guide.title: Cellarion Guide
guide.subtitle: Ask anything about the app
guide.welcomeText: I can help you navigate the app, show you features, and walk you through anything step by step.

landing.heroSubline: Cellarion is a self-hosted, open-source wine cellar manager. Track bottles, visualise racks, get drink-window alerts, and share cellars — all from a clean, private interface you own.
landing.selfHost: or self-host in minutes with Docker
landing.featuresSub: From a single bottle to a thousand, Cellarion keeps your collection organised and drinkable.
landing.featureBottleDesc: Log every bottle in your collection — vintage, producer, region, price, personal rating, and tasting notes, all in one place.
landing.featureCellarDesc: Organize bottles across multiple cellars and visualize your physical racks on an interactive grid. Know exactly where each bottle lives.
landing.featureDrinkDesc: Get notified when a bottle is approaching its peak or past it. Never open a great wine too early — or too late.
landing.featureStatsDesc: Explore your cellar with charts and maps — breakdown by country, grape, value, drink status, and more.
landing.featureSearchDesc: Powered by Meilisearch with fuzzy matching and deduplication so you always find the right wine, even with a typo.
landing.featureShareDesc: Invite friends or colleagues to browse or co-manage a cellar. Granular role-based access keeps you in control.
landing.featureLabelDesc: Snap a photo of the label and let AI fill in the details. Background removal keeps bottle images clean and beautiful.
landing.featureImportDesc: Bring your existing collection in via CSV. A structured wine registry shared across users ensures clean, consistent data.
landing.ossTitle: Built in the open, owned by you
landing.ossBody: Cellarion is released under the AGPL-3.0 license. The full source code is on GitHub — audit it, fork it, self-host it. No vendor lock-in, no subscription required, no data sent to third parties.
landing.finalSub: Free to use at cellarion.app, or deploy your own instance in minutes.
landing.metaDescription: Cellarion — the open-source wine cellar manager. Track bottles, visualise racks, get drink-window alerts, and share cellars. Self-hosted or use cellarion.app.

wineLists.title: Wine Lists
wineLists.emptyState: No wine lists yet. Create one to generate a PDF menu for your restaurant.
wineLists.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this wine list? This cannot be undone.
wineLists.quickStartDesc: Add all bottles from your cellar and use their current prices as a starting point?
wineLists.publishDesc: Publish your wine list to get a public URL. A QR code will be automatically added to the PDF so customers can scan it.
wineLists.publishedDesc: Your wine list is live. Anyone with the link can view and download the PDF. A QR code linking to this URL is automatically included on the PDF.
